questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">Direction: Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the given bold word and mark your response accordingly.</span></p>

<p>Historians of ideas are <u><strong>wary</strong> </u>about the concept of diffusion, especially of diffusion across national borders.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Accrue</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>Open your heart</p>
options: Feel relieved because the stress is removed /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</p>

<p>Putrefy</p>

<p><strong>Directions: In the following questions, out of the given alternatives, choose the one which best expresses the meaning of the given word. </strong></p>

<p>Purview</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank.</strong></p>

<p>She looked ____________&nbsp;(luminous) in the diamond necklace.&nbsp;</p>

<p>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</p>

<p>A bird of passage</p>
options: Someone who never stays in one place for long /
An official trip outside one&rsquo;s country /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>Full of hot air</p>

<p><strong>Choose the most appropriate one-word substitution for the below word.</strong></p>

<p>A state of disorder due to the absence or non-recognition of authority or other controlling systems</p>
